type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7356589467584433177","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+水仙+强强+无限流+微群像+1v1+直播】
宁朔被拉进了一个恐怖剧本杀系统。
涂着诡彩面具的小丑笑嘻嘻：【请给自己取个代号。】
宁朔略加思索：“宁半仙。”
观众们想这什么鬼名字，他这是想在恐怖游戏里忽悠那帮鬼怪吗？
直到他们在直播间里，看到宁朔神神叨叨地对一个鬼怪说，你今夜子时，最多不过半个时辰，必有血光之灾。
观众等着看他笑话，结果凌晨十二点，秒针刚刚归零，一把剑直接穿透鬼怪的咽喉。
一身古装打扮、跟宁朔长相几乎一样的男子剑指宁朔，挑眉道：“你也是怪物？”
宁朔笑吟吟：“或许，我是另一个你。”
……
见到宁望的第一眼，宁朔就知道他跟这个人拥有世上最亲近的关系，近到他们使用过同一个名字——
谢宁。
--排雷--
1.受很爱中二，身体不好，不喜勿入；
2.没有受了点小委屈就要人性命的情节，一切为剧情服务，不喜勿入；
3.双男主，有副cp，没有哭包奶受，因为作者喜欢双强，不喜勿入；
4.有直播弹幕，弹幕内容不代表作者三观，角色思想也不代表作者三观，不喜勿入。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe1072798b366eef25e5234d7de6bdf9d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二两闲","author_id":"","book_id":"7356589467584433177","book_name":"无限流：跟自己谈个恋爱很正常吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200000","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363182405126996505","read_count":"17117","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"358958"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"160","tags":"双男主,现代,系统,直播,强强,1v1,群像,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1928bf94f5d5757033755789bc0025e8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361252&x-signature=OZhRdi6%2F3RuZcguAbLzOYPH
